overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in wizard robes exploring the interior of a gothic castle. The character moves through ornate halls with red wood paneling, past tapestries and statues, and ascends a grand staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with red wood paneling and checkered marble floor

events.description: character enters the castle through large wooden doors into the red antechamber
character begins ascending the interior steps within the entrance hall

agents.ego_description: walking into the castle entrance hall, approaching the inner staircase and golden statue

entered.detail: massive dark wooden doors with metal studs and ornate carvings
wall with red wood paneling and geometric gold patterns
black and white checkered marble tile flooring
golden humanoid statue holding a staff against the red wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a grand castle antechamber through massive wooden doors. The space features ornate red wood paneling with geometric gold patterns, a golden statue, and checkered marble floors. The character walks forward and begins ascending interior steps.

scene_state.functional_zone: map room with large tapestry and corridor transition

events.description: character opens inner wooden door and enters the map room
character exits the map room into a long corridor with windows

agents.ego_description: opening the wooden door, passing through the map room, and entering the corridor

entered.detail: large arched wooden door with metal handles
large framed map hanging on the far wall of the map room
stone archway leading to the long corridor
medieval-style wall-mounted lanterns

segments.scene_description: The character opens an inner wooden door and enters a smaller map room featuring a large tapestry map on the wall. After a brief moment, the character exits into a long corridor with stone walls and tall windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: long corridor with tall windows and stone walls

events.description: character passes other students walking in the opposite direction
large potted plant briefly blocks the view as character passes

agents.ego_description: walking down the corridor, passing other students and decorative elements

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking past the character in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall arched windows letting in natural light
rough stone block walls with wooden paneling
dark wood cabinets with glass doors displaying artifacts
large potted plants in blue and white ceramic pots

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a long corridor with tall windows on the left casting natural light onto stone walls. The character passes wooden display cabinets and large potted plants, encountering other students walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with wooden paneling and large tapestries

events.description: character enters the large tapestry hall from the corridor
character begins ascending the grand staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through the expansive hall, observing the tapestries and approaching the grand staircase

entered.detail: large framed tapestries depicting maps and scenes on the walls
dark wood paneled walls with decorative moldings
wide stone staircase with wooden banisters leading upward
red and gold patterned rugs covering the stone floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a grand hall with high ceilings, dark wood paneling, and large tapestries on the walls. The space is illuminated by light from tall windows. The character walks across ornate carpets toward a wide grand staircase at the far end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase leading to upper level

events.description: character begins climbing the stone steps of the grand staircase
character reaches the top landing and approaches the upper door

agents.ego_description: climbing the grand staircase toward the upper level of the castle

entered.detail: carved wooden handrails along the staircase
large arched wooden door at the top of the stairs
thick stone pillars supporting the ceiling
tall window at the upper landing letting in bright light

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand staircase with carved wooden banisters, moving from the lower hall toward the upper level. Bright light streams through a tall window at the landing. The character approaches a large arched wooden door at the top of the stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the opulent interior of a gothic castle, transitioning from ornate wood-paneled chambers into a bright, expansive grand hall. It begins as the character enters a grand antechamber with checkered marble floors and gold-patterned red paneling, moving forward to ascend a set of interior steps. The camera then follows the character through a small map room and into a long stone corridor, where natural light from tall windows illuminates potted plants and passing students. This path opens into a vast hall with high ceilings and large tapestries, leading the character across ornate carpets toward a wide staircase. Finally, the camera ascends the carved wooden banisters toward a bright landing, ending as the character approaches a large arched door at the top of the stairs.
